2603.28534.title: Compressing Transformer Language Models via Matrix Product Operator Decomposition: A Case Study on PicoGPT
2603.28534.paper_summary: Transformer-based language models achieve strong performance across NLP tasks, but their quadratic parameter scaling with hidden dimension makes deployment on resource-constrained hardware expensive. We study Matrix Product Operator (MPO) decomposition as a principled compression method for transformers. MPO factorises weight matrices into chains of low-rank cores, with approximation quality controlled by the bond dimension chi. We replace every nn.Linear layer in PicoGPT, a GPT-2-style character-level language model with about 1M parameters, with an MPOLinear module parameterised as an MPO chain. Cores are initialised either by TT-SVD from pretrained dense weights or from random initialisation, and trained using standard PyTorch autograd without a custom backward pass. We derive balanced factorisation schemes for the five distinct weight shapes in PicoGPT and evaluate bond dimensions chi in {4, 8, 16, 32} on Tiny Shakespeare. MPO compression achieves up to 13x compression per transformer block at chi = 4. At chi = 16, the model uses 191,872 parameters instead of 1,020,224 while retaining 97.7% of baseline token accuracy (51.6% vs 52.8%). Reconstruction error follows the expected trend and is lower for three-site than two-site factorisations at the same bond dimension. The chi = 8 model gives the best accuracy per parameter, exceeding the dense baseline by 2.7x on this metric. These results show that MPO parameterisation is a practical and theoretically grounded alternative to low-rank methods and unstructured pruning for transformer compression.
2603.28534.paper_summary_zh: 基於Transformer的語言模型在自然語言處理任務中表現出色，但其隱藏維度的二次參數擴展使得在資源受限的硬體上部署成本高昂。 我們研究矩陣乘積算子（MPO）分解作為Transformer的原則性壓縮方法。 MPO將權重矩陣分解為低秩核心的鏈，近似質量由鍵維度chi控制。 我們將PicoGPT中的每個nn.Linear層替換為參數化為MPO鏈的MPOLinear模塊，PicoGPT是一個約有100萬參數的GPT-2風格字符級語言模型。 核心要麼通過從預訓練的稠密權重中進行TT-SVD初始化，要麼通過隨機初始化，並使用標準的PyTorch自動微分進行訓練，而不需要自定義的反向傳播。 我們為PicoGPT中五種不同的權重形狀推導了平衡分解方案，並在Tiny Shakespeare上評估了鍵維度chi在{4, 8, 16, 32}中的表現。 在chi = 4時，MPO壓縮在每個Transformer塊上實現了高達13倍的壓縮。 在chi = 16時，模型使用191,872個參數，而不是1,020,224，同時保留了97.7%的基線標記準確率（51.6%對52.8%）。 重建誤差遵循預期趨勢，並且在相同鍵維度下，三站點的分解比兩站點的分解要低。 chi = 8的模型在每個參數上提供了最佳準確性，在這一指標上超過了稠密基線2.7倍。 這些結果表明，MPO參數化是Transformer壓縮中低秩方法和無結構修剪的實用且理論上有根據的替代方案。
2603.28534.author: Younes Javanmard et.al.
2603.28534.authors: Younes Javanmard, Tanmoy Pandit, Masoud Mardani
